question: William is enrolled in a book-of-the-month club. This club sends members leather-bound editions of classic books the same day each month. As a reward for loyalty, William receives a free book at the end of each year. If William pays $468 per year for the club, what is the average price he pays for each book?

solution.strategy: Total paid divided by total books (12 paid + 1 free = 13 books).
